initial_entry.author: glebglazov
initial_entry.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Edit codeblocks of Markdown documents with external editors to get autocompletion, indentation, LSP capabilities of your favourite editor (Neovim, VSCode, etc).
